chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُتَفٌ وَ جَوَامِعُ مِنَ الرِّوَايَةِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 109 – In it are pointers and the concise from the reports regarding the Wilayah

text: كَانَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَخَذَ مِيثَاقَ شِيعَتِنَا بِالْوَلَايَةِ لَنَا وَ هُمْ ذَرٌّ يَوْمَ أَخَذَ الْمِيثَاقَ عَلَى الذَّرِّ بِالْإِقْرَارِ لَهُ بِالرُّبُوبِيَّةِ وَ لِمُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِالنُّبُوَّةِ

وَ عَرَضَ اللَّهُ جَلَّ وَ عَزَّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أُمَّتَهُ فِي الطِّينِ وَ هُمْ أَظِلَّةٌ وَ خَلَقَهُمْ مِنَ الطِّينَةِ الَّتِي خُلِقَ مِنْهَا آدَمُ وَ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ أَرْوَاحَ شِيعَتِنَا قَبْلَ أَبْدَانِهِمْ بِأَلْفَيْ عَامٍ وَ عَرَضَهُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَ عَرَّفَهُمْ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ عَرَّفَهُمْ عَلِيّاً وَ نَحْنُ نَعْرِفُهُمْ فِي لَحْنِ الْقَوْلِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Bukeyr Bin Ayn who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Took the Covenant of our<sup>asws</sup> Shias with the Wilayah for us<sup>asws</sup>, and they were particles on the day the Covenant was Taken upon the particles with the acknowledgment to Him<sup>azwj</sup> with the Lordship, and to Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> with the Prophet-hood.

And Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Majestic and Mighty Presented to Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, his<sup>saww</sup> community in the clay, and they were shadows. And He<sup>azwj</sup> Created them from the lay from which Adam<sup>as</sup> was created, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created the spirits of our<sup>asws</sup> Shias before their bodies, by two thousand years, and presented them unto him<sup>saww</sup>. And He<sup>azwj</sup> Introduced them to Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, and Introduced them to Ali<sup>asws</sup>. And we<sup>asws</sup> recognise them in the tone of their speech’.
